---
name: Correction, question, or general note
about: Fix a fact; ask a scoping question; or suggest a doc improvement with context
title: "[Correction/Question] "
labels: []
---

### Type
Correction / question / other (brief)

### File or page (if any)
e.g. `case-studies/contribution-evidence.md` or a URL

### Details
What should change, or what is unclear?

### Sources
Links to upstream issues, PRs, or commits (required for factual corrections).
